title: Poupartia castanea

intro: Poupartia castanea, also known as the East African chestnut tree, is a deciduous tree species native to tropical Africa. The health benefits of Poupartia castanea include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, which can aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections.
